mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BOARD.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD( BOARD_NO, UBTYPE_NO, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, BOARD_WRITER )VALUES( #{boardNo}, #{ubtypeNo}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{boardWriter} )
INSERT INTO FILES( FILE_NO, ORIGIN_NAME, CHANGE_NAME, TARGET_TYPE, TARGET_NO) VALUES( SEQ_FNO.NEXTVAL, #{originName}, #{changeName}, #{targetType}, #{targetNo} )
mapper.select:
SELECT B.BOARD_NO, B.BOARD_TITLE, B.BOARD_WRITER, B.CREATE_DATE, B.VIEW_COUNT AS "viewCount", BT.BTYPE_NAME AS "categoryName", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_LIKE L WHERE L.BOARD_NO = B.BOARD_NO) AS "likeCount" FROM BOARD B LEFT JOIN UNI_BOARD_TYPE UBT ON (B.UBTYPE_NO = UBT.UNI_NO) LEFT JOIN BOARD_TYPE BT ON (UBT.BTYPE_NO = BT.BTYPE_NO) WHERE B.STATUS = 'Y'
AND BT.BTYPE_NAME = '자유게시판'
AND BT.BTYPE_NAME = '질문답변'
AND BT.BTYPE_NAME = '사건사고'
AND BT.BTYPE_NAME = '공지사항'
ORDER BY B.BOARD_NO DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET VIEW_COUNT = VIEW_COUNT + 1 WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_NO, UBTYPE_NO, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, BOARD_WRITER, VIEW_COUNT AS "viewCount", CREATE_DATE AS "createDate" FROM BOARD WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND STATUS = 'Y'

SELECT FILE_NO AS "fileNo", ORIGIN_NAME AS "originName", CHANGE_NAME AS "changeName", TARGET_TYPE AS "targetType", TARGET_NO AS "targetNo" FROM FILES WHERE TARGET_NO = #{boardNo} AND TARGET_TYPE = 'BOARD'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_LIKE WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND MEM_NO = #{memNo}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM BOARD_LIKE WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND MEM_NO = #{memNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_LIKE WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPORT( REPORT_NO, REPORT_MEM, REASON_NO, REASON_CONTENT, TARGET_TYPE, TARGET_NO ) VALUES( SEQ_REPORT_NO.NEXTVAL, #{reportMem}, #{reasonNo}, #{reasonContent}, #{targetType}, #{targetNo} )
